themes.reasoning_notes: Massly answers artifacts and enchantments; its token drawback is incidental to a broad noncreature board-clear effect.
It gives each affected player a 2/2 Bear, but token creation is symmetrical and not the card's main deckbuilding pull.
Sweeper that destroys all artifacts outright; this is a strong, explicit anti-artifact effect and a major deckbuilding reason to run it.
Also wipes all enchantments with equal emphasis, making the card just as much enchantment hate as artifact hate; Bear tokens are incidental.
